title: Part 7 – Passage unique : politique de livraison
instructions: Lisez le texte, puis répondez aux questions.
passage:
Shipping & Delivery Information - GreenBox Deliveries

Standard delivery takes 3 to 5 business days and costs $5.99 for orders under $50. Orders over $50 qualify for free standard delivery.

Express delivery is available for an additional $12.99 and guarantees delivery within 1 to 2 business days. Express orders placed before 2 p.m. on weekdays will be processed the same day.

Please note that we do not deliver on weekends or public holidays. If your delivery date falls on one of these days, your package will arrive on the next business day.

If your package has not arrived within the expected timeframe, please contact our customer service team with your order number. We recommend waiting at least one extra business day before reporting a delay, as delivery estimates can occasionally vary.

questions.prompt: How can a customer qualify for free standard delivery?
choices: By signing up for a membership
questions.explanation: "Orders over $50 qualify for free standard delivery".

questions.prompt: What is required for an express order to be processed the same day?
choices: It must be placed before 2 p.m. on a weekday
It must be picked up in store
questions.explanation: "Express orders placed before 2 p.m. on weekdays will be processed the same day".

questions.prompt: What happens if a delivery date falls on a public holiday?
choices: The package arrives on the next business day
questions.explanation: "your package will arrive on the next business day".

questions.prompt: What does the company recommend before reporting a delay?
choices: Waiting at least one extra business day
questions.explanation: "We recommend waiting at least one extra business day before reporting a delay".
